form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (19.83) at Hobart in a Restricted WIN, finishing fourth and beaten 6 lengths. Has two successes and two minors from seven starts from box 1. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Ended last campaign with a seventh (16.94) in a GR 5 at this track and returns after a ten weeks break. Yet to win but has placed two of four runs fresh. Looks one of the hopes in the race.
